name: PoseGuard
summary: Real-time driver monitoring system that detects distracted or unsafe driving posture.
desc: Real-time driver monitoring system that detects distracted or unsafe driver postures.
problem: Driver distraction needs faster, more consistent detection than manual review can provide.
approach: Built a Python computer-vision pipeline using OpenCV and CNN workflows to detect posture and distraction signals.
impact: Created an alert-ready monitoring flow and logged 80+ distraction events during testing.

name: Amazon Product Reviews Sentiment Analyzer
summary: A deployed sentiment analysis app that classifies reviews and visualizes customer opinion patterns.
desc: Sentiment analysis tool to classify reviews as positive, negative, or neutral, and provide a visual representation of the sentiment distribution.
problem: Product teams need a faster way to understand review sentiment without reading every comment manually.
approach: Created an NLP workflow with a web interface for classification, sentiment distribution, and review interpretation.
impact: Shipped a live tool that turns unstructured customer feedback into easier decision support.

name: Ecommerce Sales Dashboard
summary: Interactive sales dashboard for monitoring performance, customer behavior, and business KPIs.
desc: The dashboard provides comprehensive insights into sales performance, customer behavior, and other key metrics to help drive business decisions.
problem: Sales performance data becomes difficult to act on when metrics are scattered across sources.
approach: Designed a dashboard view around sales KPIs, customer behavior, and performance comparisons.
impact: Improved decision readiness by turning sales data into a clear executive-style dashboard.

name: Mental Health Sentiment Analysis
summary: Text analysis project for categorizing mental-health-related statements into meaningful sentiment groups.
desc: Analysis aimed at identifying and categorizing various mental health conditions based on user statements.
problem: Mental-health statements require careful text classification to surface patterns responsibly.
approach: Cleaned text data, engineered features, and evaluated NLP classification approaches.
impact: Built a structured analysis flow for transforming raw statements into interpretable categories.

name: Multilingual Chatbot Ticket Booking System
summary: A multilingual chatbot ticket-booking platform with booking flows, 3D museum viewing, and web support.
desc: A Multilingual Chatbot Ticket Booking System enabling ticket reservations, 3D museum model viewing, chatbot assistance, and multi-language web interface support.
problem: Visitors need a simpler booking experience that handles language friction and guided assistance.
approach: Built a multilingual web product with chatbot support, ticket-booking flow, and 3D museum interaction.
impact: Deployed a live product prototype that combines accessibility, automation, and immersive browsing.

name: Cricket Best 11 Analysis Dashboard
summary: Power BI dashboard for comparing players and selecting an optimized cricket playing eleven.
desc: Cricket Best 11 Analysis Dashboard, a Power BI-based interactive platform designed to help you analyze and select the best playing 11 for cricket teams.
problem: Team selection requires comparing multiple performance dimensions quickly and fairly.
approach: Modeled player metrics in Power BI and designed interactive views for role-based comparison.
impact: Created a decision-support dashboard for faster, more transparent playing-eleven selection.

name: AI Voice Assistant
summary: Python-based voice assistant integrating speech recognition and intelligent response generation.
desc: Mihir A.I, a Python-based voice assistant that leverages Google Cloud Speech-to-Text for precise command interpretation and OpenAI's GPT-3 for intelligent responses.
problem: Users need a hands-free way to trigger tasks and receive contextual answers.
approach: Integrated speech-to-text, command interpretation, and AI response generation in Python.
impact: Created an assistant prototype that demonstrates applied AI interaction design.

name: Ball Tracker
summary: Video analytics project that tracks colored balls, records quadrant events, and generates processed output.
desc: This project involves tracking balls of different colors in a video, recording their entry events into different quadrants, and generating an output video.
problem: Manual video review is inefficient for tracking movement and event-entry patterns.
approach: Used color tracking, quadrant logic, event logging, and processed-video output generation.
impact: Automated a visual analytics workflow that records events directly from video streams.

name: AI Augmented Design Feedback System
summary: AI-assisted feedback system concept for improving mechanical design review and iteration.
desc: The AI-Augmented Design Feedback System is an innovative solution aimed at enhancing mechanical design processes.
problem: Mechanical design feedback can be slow, inconsistent, and hard to operationalize.
approach: Explored AI-assisted feedback loops to support design review and decision quality.
impact: Produced a practical concept for improving iteration speed and review clarity.

name: Python Complete Guide
summary: Structured Python learning repository with tutorials, examples, and implementation references.
desc: Welcome to the Python Complete Guide repository. This repository contains a comprehensive collection of Python tutorials and implementations.
problem: Learners need a single organized path for Python fundamentals and implementation examples.
approach: Curated topic-based tutorials and code references into a searchable repository.
impact: Created a reusable learning asset for Python and analytics foundations.

name: Data Science Complete Guide
summary: Repository of data science concepts, examples, and practical learning resources.
desc: Welcome to the Data Science Guide Repository! This repository contains comprehensive resources and examples to help you learn Data Science concepts.
problem: Data science learners often struggle with scattered concepts and disconnected examples.
approach: Organized core concepts, code examples, and references into a guided repository.
impact: Built a reusable knowledge base for strengthening applied data science foundations.

name: Hospital Management System
summary: Java and MySQL system for streamlining hospital administration and patient-management workflows.
desc: Implemented a comprehensive hospital management system using Java and MySQL, streamlining administrative tasks and enhancing patient care.
problem: Hospital operations need structured records and simpler administrative workflows.
approach: Built a Java and MySQL application for core hospital management tasks.
impact: Demonstrated database-backed workflow design for operational efficiency.

name: Rubik Cube
summary: Interactive 3x3x3 Rubik Cube experience with timer and solving-stat tracking.
desc: It allows users to interact with a 3x3x3 Rubik Cube, track their solving time, and keep records of their solving statistics.
problem: Puzzle users need a simple web-based way to practice and measure solving progress.
approach: Built an interactive browser experience with controls, timing, and stats.
impact: Shipped a live web app with clear feedback loops for repeat use.

name: Stick Hero Game
summary: Browser game that rewards timing, distance judgment, and quick retry interaction loops.
desc: The game involves extending a stick to reach the platforms and land safely to score points.
problem: Simple web games need responsive controls and clear feedback to feel satisfying.
approach: Implemented game mechanics, scoring, and interaction states in the browser.
impact: Deployed a lightweight game that demonstrates frontend interaction polish.

name: Java Complete Guide
summary: Structured Java repository covering fundamentals through advanced programming examples.
desc: Welcome to the Java Complete Guide Repository! This repository contains comprehensive resources and examples to help you learn Java programming from the basics to advanced topics.
problem: Java learners need clear examples organized from fundamentals to deeper concepts.
approach: Created a repository of guided examples, explanations, and reference implementations.
impact: Built a durable learning resource for programming and software fundamentals.

name: Neural Net ASM
summary: Experimental machine-learning library concepts implemented at a low level in Assembly.
desc: This project aims to create a custom machine learning library implemented in Assembly language. The library focuses on neural networks and kernel functions.
problem: Understanding ML internals requires looking below high-level frameworks.
approach: Explored neural-network and kernel concepts through low-level implementation.
impact: Strengthened model-mechanics understanding by moving closer to computational primitives.
